creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Ivan Rozhuk from comment #26)

The Porter's Handbook suggests post-install for dynamic plist generation

https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/plist/

The "post-install" is invoked when you do not override "do-install" but use just plain "install". Can you please make such correction and re-test the port and submit new version so we have it clean in our tree :-)
